checks.finding: T-001..T-004 declare Risk: high with rationale citing security-spec.md boundaries (B2/B3), REQ-002/004/007/008/009/012, and path-guard/public-API-contract proximity (T-004 modifies contracts/sdd-forge-mcp-tools.v1.schema.json, an externally-visible API contract sentinel surface per risk-classification-policy.md). None of the high tasks are UI-copy/CSS/docs/test-only. T-005 (medium, test/golden-only, acceptance-first) and T-006 (low, docs/traceability-only) are consistent with their Scope/Done When. No over- or under-classification found.

T-001, T-002, T-003, T-004 (all Risk: high) each include in Done When: 'Red→Green evidence 記録(tdd)' and '独立レビュー verdict PASS が evidence に記録される' (independent review verdict recorded). No Risk: critical tasks are present, so the second-approver/signed-bundle requirement does not apply. No high task is missing either required item.

T-004's Scope section spans 6 distinct implementation areas (mcp/sdd-forge-mcp/src/server.ts, src/tools/evidence.ts, contracts/sdd-forge-mcp-tools.v1.schema.json, dist/, tests/tools/, tests/smoke/), exceeding the 3-area oversized-task threshold, and its title joins 4 concerns with '+' ('ツール登録 + 契約(evidenceDeepVerifyData) + 決定論 + スモーク'), matching the multi-phase-title indicator. This risks the task being split mid-implementation across unrelated concerns (registration, contract schema, dist rebuild, smoke test) in a single focused session.

T-001 covers AC-004/AC-005/AC-017 (missing/too-large/path-denied/invalid-recorded-sha error paths); T-002 covers AC-006/AC-007/AC-008/AC-009/AC-010/AC-019 (drift, malformed git_commit, cross-binding mismatch, absent-specs edge cases); T-004 covers AC-015 (invalid-input/not-found/cannot-parse error envelopes) alongside its happy-path AC-001. No functional task relies on happy-path-only ACs.

TEST-007 and TEST-013 are declared 'unit' and target a single function boundary each (git_commit shape regex; determinism of one function call) — correct. TEST-001..006, 008-010, 017-019 are declared 'integration' and each involves ≥2 components (tool logic + path-guard + filesystem fixtures, or tool + spec files, or tool + contract/report files) — correct. TEST-012 (golden, host-script parity) and TEST-016 (smoke, MCP Inspector CLI) use established project-specific labels consistent with existing sdd-forge-mcp test suite conventions (tests/golden/, tests/smoke/) and reference the relevant AC (AC-012, AC-016) — no mismatch between declared type and scope width found.

T-001, T-002, T-003, T-004 (all Risk: high) each carry a 'Rollback:' field specifying commit revert as the recovery path (T-001/T-004 additionally reference design.md 'Deployment / CI Plan'). No high/critical task lacks rollback consideration.

mcp/sdd-forge-mcp/src/tools/evidence.ts is claimed by T-001, T-002, T-003, and T-004, and mcp/sdd-forge-mcp/tests/tools/ is claimed by T-001, T-002, and T-004, but Blockers strictly chain them (T-002 blocked by T-001; T-003 blocked by T-001,T-002; T-004 blocked by T-001,T-002,T-003), matching the check's accepted incremental-same-file pattern. No uncoordinated parallel overlap: reviewer-a's DEPENDENCY-CYCLE check (integrated-summary.json) also reports PASS for the same dependency graph.

T-002 depends on T-001's per-artifact/verdict skeleton (same evidence.ts); T-003 depends on T-001/T-002 to avoid uncoordinated edits to the same file and because static/no-secrets tests scope the code added so far; T-004 depends on T-001-T-003 because its Goal explicitly states it integrates their judgment cores into the complete evidenceDeepVerifyData response (no single function returns the full shape before T-004); T-005 depends on T-004 because its golden parity check (AC-012) exercises the fully integrated tool; T-006 depends on T-001-T-005 for accurate final documentation/traceability. No blocker lacks a corresponding scope dependency and no missing blocker was found.
SKIP: no bugfix or debugging task in scope.

findings.finding: Scope spans 6 distinct implementation areas (server.ts, evidence.ts, contracts schema, dist/, tests/tools/, tests/smoke/) exceeding the 3-area single-coherent-unit threshold; title joins 4 concerns with '+' (tool registration + contract + determinism + smoke), matching the multi-phase-title oversized indicator. Consider splitting the contract/schema addition and dist-parity rebuild from the server registration + integration-assembly + smoke-test work.
